descriptionTemplate: Pickman gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 stack of {Fantasia}. For each stack of {Creativity} Pickman gains, {Embryo Fusion}+ [Arg2].

patch.descriptionTemplate: Pickman gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 stack of {Fantasia}. For each stack of {Creativity} Pickman gains, {Embryo Fusion}+ [Arg2]. The duration of the Painted Golden Relic created by {Lifelike Rendition} is increased from 1 turn to 2 turns.
